channel.title: +Articles on आगमे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on आगमे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: Proclus: divine penetration in reality
item.description: Source: TW From: Philosophy as a Rite of Rebirth: From Ancient Egypt to Neoplatonism, by Algis Uždavinys. Thread by @egy_philosopher on Thread Reader Proclus’ conception of Divine Forms and Unities and how the Divine penetrates through all layers of manifested reality. In late antiquity, an Idea is regarded as an incorporeal thing which is the cause of those things which are similar to it and is the model for the existence of sensible things.
